resources.string: Grant folder access for deep junk scan
Other apps\' caches cannot be cleared without root — open each app\'s settings to clear them manually.
Removed %1$d cached files from this app
%1$d more files (%2$s) can be removed with your confirmation.
Adds blurry & similar photo review. Adds ~2 min on large libraries.
Needs folder access — grant in Storage tool
Skipped — not available on this device
Usage access is required to read per-app storage sizes.
Add an API key in Settings to enable the AI assistant.
The assistant reads your local device-health snapshot and suggests improvements. Nothing is sent until you tap Analyze.
Free, open-source phone cleaner. No ads, no subscriptions. All actions run on your device; the AI assistant only sends data when you ask it to.
Automatically switch dark/light with system setting
FreeSystemDoctor cleans and maintains your phone without root. Some features need special access.
Read per-app storage sizes and app usage.
Find large files, duplicates and screenshots.
The largest copy in each group is kept; the rest are removed via the system delete dialog.
Usage access is required to read screen time.
Foreground time over the last 7 days.
User apps not opened in the last 30 days.
Apps with granted sensitive permissions. Tap an app to review or revoke in system settings.
Export an installed app\'s APK to your Downloads folder.
Clears text currently stored in the system clipboard.
Automatic maintenance clears this app\'s cache and notifies you about reclaimable junk. Shared files are never deleted without your confirmation.
Freed %1$s of cache · %2$s reclaimable junk found
Unlocks tools that need sensitive permissions (file shredder, system tweaks, monitor).
Grant access to a folder to measure its size, browse it and remove empty folders.
Overwrites a file with random data before deleting it. Note: on flash storage, wear levelling means overwriting cannot guarantee physical erasure. Works for files you select and grant access to.
Usage access is required to read per-app data usage.
Mobile + Wi-Fi over the last 30 days.
These open system screens — Android does not allow changing them directly without root. You make the change; we just take you there.
Persistent notification showing live RAM and free storage.
Keeps scheduled cleaning and the monitor reliable.
Open the system data usage / data saver screen.
Groups visually-similar photos. The largest in each group is kept; the rest are removed via the system delete dialog.
Screenshots are matched by name/path; blurry photos by low sharpness. Review before deleting.
Creates a smaller JPEG copy in Pictures/FreeSystemDoctor. The original is kept so you can delete it yourself.
Wi-Fi scan results require location permission (Android requirement).
Grant notification access to review and dismiss notifications.
Measures download throughput by fetching a 10 MB test file.
Speed test failed. Check your connection.
Battery wear/health (design vs current mAh) is not reliably exposed without root, so we don\'t guess it.
Battery optimization already ignored for this app.
Asks the system to drop cached background apps. On modern Android the effect is small and temporary — apps reload — so we report the real amount freed, not an inflated number.
Tap the trash icon to uninstall and free up storage.
Exports your data to Downloads. Read-only — nothing is changed, deleted or uploaded.
Grant contacts access to find duplicates and export a vCard.
Grant SMS access to export your messages.
Game Booster — one-tap real boost + per-game profiles
Plans are loading or unavailable. Make sure you\'re signed in to Google Play.
Watch an ad to unlock advanced tools for 24h
Advanced tools are a Pro feature. Upgrade or watch an ad to unlock them.
Items the system moved to trash (Android 11+). Pick what to bring back or empty for good.
Reads hidden cache folders that popular apps keep under Android/media. Pick the Android/media folder once to grant access.
Grant the Android/media folder to start scanning.
A biometric-locked, encrypted sandbox for sensitive files. Files are encrypted with a device-bound key and never leave this app.
Biometric authentication (fingerprint, face or device PIN) must be set up first.
Get a notification when your battery hits the thresholds — useful for stopping charging early to preserve battery health.
Checked every 15 minutes by the system.
Battery at %1$d%% — unplug to extend its lifespan.
A weekly look at how you use your phone — total screen time, recent installs and apps without a launcher icon.
Choose how to enable this Pro feature.
Watch a short ad. Just this tool, just for today.
Watch a short ad, unlock everything for 3 days. One-time offer.
All tools, no ads, support development.
Ad not ready — try again in a moment
Pick what to do next — no rush.
Try Pro for 3 days (watch an ad)
One-time offer. Full Pro for 3 days.
A single \"cost\" score per app from storage, cache, 30-day data, 7-day screen time and last use. Top hogs first.
Score is heuristic — high doesn\'t always mean removable. Review before acting.
Grant Usage Access in Settings to compute scores.
Predicts how many days until storage runs out, based on a 7–14 day trend of your free space.
Gathering data — about %1$d days to go
Snapshots are taken once a day. Forecast assumes your usage stays roughly the same.
~%1$d days until full at current pace. Open Cleaner.
Frees background RAM, switches the system to Do-Not-Disturb (priority), keeps a clear end-session notification.
Pick apps to lock behind your fingerprint or device PIN. Best-effort — not a security boundary against a skilled attacker.
Usage Access is required to detect app launches
Allow drawing over other apps (needed to show the prompt above a locked app)
Bundles your settings, app list, Wi-Fi list, and optional contacts + SMS into a passphrase-encrypted file. You pick the destination (Google Drive, OneDrive, any cloud exposed via SAF).
If you lose this passphrase, your backup is unrecoverable. Save it offline (paper or password manager).
All encryption happens on this device. The cloud only sees an encrypted blob.
Free background RAM, purge cache, mute interruptions — real numbers, no fake FPS.
Tap to open • use the action to end the session
We don\'t overclock or change CPU governor (impossible without root). We free real resources and reduce interruptions.
Grant Do-Not-Disturb access in Settings to silence calls/notifications during the session.
Mutes notifications for the duration of the boost (priority + emergency still come through).
No installed apps declared as games. Tap below to pick from all apps.
Sustained performance mode supported on this device.
No cleans recorded yet. Run a scan and the savings will show up here.
Every value here is a real measured byte count returned by the cleaner — no estimates.
+%1$d more records — get PRO to see the full history and export CSV.
Daily limit reached (%1$d/day). PRO removes the cap.
Finds folders left behind by uninstalled apps under Android/data, Android/media, and well-known public dirs (WhatsApp, Telegram…). Pick the storage root once to grant access.
Some Android/data subfolders can\'t be read without Shizuku on Android 13+. Enable it in Settings to recover them.
Detected %1$d leftover folders from uninstalled apps. Open CorpseFinder to clean.
Targets expendable subfolders inside each installed app\'s data — cache, logs, .thumbnails, sent-media backups. OPT_IN paths start unchecked.
Nothing expendable found. Grant the Android/data folder first if you haven\'t.
Per-app deep cleaners with fine-grained subfolder toggles. Pick a supported app below.
%1$s is not installed on this device.
Estimates current capacity from your real charging sessions. Needs at least 3 sessions of ≥40%% delta to compute.
Not enough data yet — keep charging your phone normally and check back after a few full cycles.
Recorded charging sessions. We sample current draw every 30 seconds while plugged in — no fake numbers.
No charging sessions recorded yet. Plug your phone in to start the log.
Estimate based on foreground time and app category. We only show real mAh when the system grants direct access to battery stats (rare on OEM builds).
No usage data available. Grant Usage Access to see the breakdown.
Tap a rectangle to drill into a folder. Sizes are real — measured by walking the granted SAF tree.
Counts notifications posted by each app over the last 7 days. Enable Notification Access first.
No notifications recorded yet. Make sure notification access is granted.
Sent stop request — system may need a moment.
≈ %1$s of leftover data may stay behind after uninstall. Clean it now with CorpseFinder?
Optional. When enabled and Shizuku is running, CorpseFinder and App Deep Clean can reach Android/data on Android 13+ and run real force-stop. Off by default.
Permission denied — open Shizuku to grant.
Some folders need Shizuku to clean. Open Settings to enable.
CorpseFinder — recover real GB from uninstalled apps
App deep clean + WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / TikTok cleaners
Battery health, charging log, drain breakdown
No mode active. Pick one to apply a setting bundle.
No active rules. Pick a preset below to get started.
Notify when free space falls below 10%
Run cache clean while charging is plentiful
Run a deep scan every Sunday morning
Activate Privacy mode when joining an open network
Run static APK risk scan on newly installed apps
Unlimited privacy audits — no daily cap
